claims.summary: Semantic persistence uses nonlinear fill shaping, recovery hold, release handover, and contextual multipliers.
claims.disposition: Verified the current implementation and its bounded authority description.

claims.summary: Fill jitter near recovery boundaries could create stale-window oscillation.
claims.disposition: Verified hysteresis and smoothstep handover, including one-percent sweeps and 0.24/0.26 regressions that bound micro-stutter.

claims.summary: Context persistence should saturate at its declared cap.
claims.disposition: Verified extreme entropy, velocity, and pressure inputs cannot exceed the 2.05 context multiplier cap.

claims.summary: Audiovisual staleness and semantic persistence might prune the same lane twice.
claims.disposition: Verified current application sites keep audiovisual and semantic freshness paths distinct and apply one selected semantic stale window per semantic decision.
